notes: Highest-trust behavioral evidence captured from Papaya test/client traces. Store logs, screenshots, packet notes, and quest run notes here.
CloverTOS authoritative server data currently used by Melia.
CloverTOS NPC, map, warp, track, and client script implementations.
Extracted client/IPF evidence, including IES, XML, addon, shared, and script data.

Alternate official domain for the same quest guide.
Quest list and detail pages. Useful for display names, NPCs, maps, objectives, and required quest hints.
Open-source public database UI covering iTOS and related datasets.
Low-trust but useful mechanics overview and cross-check source.
Community reports and historical quest breakage hints. Use only as weak corroborating evidence.
Place authorized Discord exports here. The MCP does not access private Discord directly.
Manual seed for public repo research. Cache specific discovered files, not broad search result pages.
